description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated male figure with long hair and a beard, resting his head on his right hand in a contemplative or sorrowful pose. The figure is draped in a cloth around the waist, with the upper body and legs exposed, and sits on a simple rectangular base. The facial features are detailed, with closed eyes and a somber expression, and the hair is rendered in textured waves. The left arm rests on the left knee, while the right elbow is propped on the right thigh, supporting the head. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with a muted palette of earthy tones, suggesting it is made from stone or terracotta. There is an inscription or marking visible on the back of the base, possibly indicating a date or signature.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a seated, contemplative male figure with long hair and a cloth draped around the waist, resting his head on one hand. The figure sits on a rectangular base with visible surface texture and muted earthy colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, contemplative pose, and draped cloth around the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bent right arm supporting the head, and the detailed hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, the draped cloth, and an inscription or marking on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's left arm resting on the knee and the folds of the cloth at the back.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
